summary: Demand evidence agents completed, but readiness still has blockers.

demand_status.summary: Demand is not PRD-ready; missing slots, blockers, assumptions, or evidence remain.

triage.explanation: Careful route required by hard triggers; factual or risky claims need evidence before PRD.

problem: Existing YOLO demand evidence dispatch API/schema behavior must support research/fetch style evidence without mixing external facts with target-project facts. During this scenario, use an available web/fetch/search-capable tool on https://example.com only as external background evidence.
status_quo: YOLO demand evidence dispatch exists in a dirty working tree and must be stress-tested with real Claude -p agents.
desired_outcome: Agents can use web/fetch/search-capable tools as external evidence, mark fetched/web records scope=external, and still require project-scoped path evidence for target-project facts.
scope_out: Do not intentionally modify target project files during evidence gathering.
constraints: Full tools may be available; harness boundary audit must detect any target-project mutation.
acceptance_criteria: Agents can use web/fetch/search-capable tools as external evidence, mark fetched/web records scope=external, and still require project-scoped path evidence for target-project facts.
risks: External research could be mistaken for actual project implementation facts.

blockers.message: explorer must complete with evidence and a result before cross_check PRD readiness.
cross-checker must complete with evidence and a result before cross_check PRD readiness.
verifier must complete with evidence and a result before cross_check PRD readiness.
explorer must complete with evidence and a result before cross_check PRD readiness.
cross-checker must complete with evidence and a result before cross_check PRD readiness.
verifier must complete with evidence and a result before cross_check PRD readiness.

protocol.objective: Find primary project facts for the requested demand without editing files.
protocol.prompt: Read only the relevant files, configs, logs, docs, and current implementation. Return claims with exact paths/lines or source summaries. Separate assumptions from facts.

evidence_tasks.reason: Factual project claims need primary evidence.

protocol.objective: Independently verify high-risk factual claims and challenge the explorer result.
protocol.prompt: Use independent reads or sources. Confirm, weaken, or contradict each claim. Any conflict must become a blocker instead of being averaged away.
protocol.required_when: evidence_policy === cross_check or claim risk is high

protocol.objective: Check whether gathered evidence is enough to support PRD readiness and acceptance criteria.
protocol.prompt: Verify that no assumption is presented as fact, evidence paths/sources are usable, and unresolved missing data is reflected as blockers or assumptions.

evidence_tasks.reason: Verify blockers and assumptions are not promoted to facts.

state.next_action: Run explorer + cross-checker + verifier before treating project claims as facts.

actions.reason: Factual project claims need primary evidence.

protocol.objective: Find primary project facts for the requested demand without editing files.

actions.reason: Verify blockers and assumptions are not promoted to facts.

protocol.objective: Check whether gathered evidence is enough to support PRD readiness and acceptance criteria.
protocol.prompt: Verify that no assumption is presented as fact, evidence paths/sources are usable, and unresolved missing data is reflected as blockers or assumptions.

agent_results.claim: YOLO demand evidence dispatch API supports research/fetch style evidence with clear scope separation: project facts require repo-relative paths, while external evidence from web/fetch/search tools is marked scope=external and cannot prove target-project facts.

evidence.summary: VALID_EVIDENCE_SCOPES set defines four scope values: project, external, user, unknown
evidence.why: Core scope classification system for evidence records

evidence.summary: Agent prompt generation includes research tool capabilities: Web/fetch/search-capable tools are allowed for external research; mark those records as scope=external and do not use them as project facts
evidence.why: Defines agent behavior for external research tools

evidence.summary: demandRequestsExternalResearch function detects explicit external research requests via URLs or keywords like 'external research', 'web', 'fetch', 'search', 'browser'
evidence.why: Detects when external research is explicitly requested

evidence.summary: externalEvidencePresent function checks if agent results include external evidence by verifying scope=external, url field, or external_ source prefix
evidence.why: Validates external evidence presence in agent results

evidence.summary: Runtime validation generates EXTERNAL_RESEARCH_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED blocker when external research is requested but no scope=external evidence with URL is present
evidence.why: Enforces external evidence requirement when explicitly requested

evidence.summary: DEMAND_EVIDENCE_AGENT_PROTOCOLS defines explorer, cross-checker, and verifier roles with protocols that specify objective, prompt, and writes_code constraints
evidence.why: Core evidence agent protocol definitions

evidence.summary: evidenceRecordScope function classifies evidence scope as project, external, user, or unknown based on scope field, url/path presence, and source field
evidence.why: Scope classification logic for evidence records

evidence.summary: projectEvidenceBlockingIssues function generates PROJECT_FACT_REQUIRES_PROJECT_EVIDENCE blocker when evidence is only external/user/unknown scoped without project-scoped path evidence
evidence.why: Enforces project evidence requirement for existing-project facts

evidence.summary: Doctrine explicitly states: evidence records must declare scope as project, external, user, or unknown; project facts require project-scoped evidence with repo-relative path
evidence.why: Product-level specification of scope requirements

evidence.summary: Evidence agent protocols: explorer reads files/docs/config/logs; cross-checker independently verifies; verifier checks evidence sufficiency for PRD readiness
evidence.why: High-level evidence agent workflow specification

evidence.summary: Example.com is a simple HTTP test domain used for documentation and testing purposes
evidence.why: External research target specified in demand

risks: If scope classification logic fails to detect external evidence, PRD readiness could incorrectly validate project facts without proper project-scoped evidence

result.notes: Evidence confirms that YOLO demand dispatch supports research/fetch style evidence with proper scope separation. The system correctly distinguishes between external research (scope=external with URLs) and project facts (scope=project with repo-relative paths). Runtime validation prevents external evidence from being used to prove target-project facts.

agent_results.claim: Cross-check confirms YOLO demand evidence dispatch API supports research/fetch style evidence with clear scope separation. All code locations and doctrinal statements cited by explorer are verified. The system correctly enforces that project-scoped facts require repo-relative path evidence, while external evidence from web/fetch/search tools is marked scope=external and cannot prove target-project facts.

evidence.summary: VALID_EVIDENCE_SCOPES = new Set(['project', 'external', 'user', 'unknown']) defines the four valid evidence scopes
evidence.why: Core scope classification system - independently verified

evidence.summary: Agent prompt explicitly instructs: 'If the demand explicitly asks for external research/fetch/search, actually use an available web/fetch/search-capable tool... Record those records as scope=external; if no such tool is available, put that in missing.'
evidence.why: Agent behavior contract for external research - independently verified

evidence.summary: demandRequestsExternalResearch function detects URLs and keywords: 'external research', 'web', 'fetch', 'search', 'browser'
evidence.why: External research request detection logic - independently verified

evidence.summary: externalEvidencePresent function checks for scope=external, url field, or external_ source prefix in agent results
evidence.why: External evidence validation logic - independently verified

evidence.summary: Runtime generates EXTERNAL_RESEARCH_EVIDENCE_REQUIRED blocker when external research requested but no scope=external evidence with URL present
evidence.why: Runtime enforcement of external evidence requirement - independently verified

evidence.summary: DEMAND_EVIDENCE_AGENT_PROTOCOLS defines explorer, cross_checker, and verifier roles with objective, prompt, writes_code=false, and result_schema
evidence.why: Evidence agent protocol definitions - independently verified

evidence.summary: evidenceRecordScope classifies evidence as project, external, user, or unknown based on scope field, url/path presence, and source field
evidence.why: Scope classification implementation - independently verified

evidence.summary: projectEvidenceBlockingIssues generates PROJECT_FACT_REQUIRES_PROJECT_EVIDENCE blocker when evidence lacks project-scoped path evidence for existing-project facts
evidence.why: Project evidence requirement enforcement - independently verified

evidence.summary: Doctrine states: 'evidence records must declare scope as project, external, user, or unknown. project evidence from target projects code/tests/docs/config/logs/artifacts must carry repo-relative path'
evidence.why: Product-level specification - independently verified

evidence.summary: Evidence agent protocols: explorer reads only; cross-checker independently verifies; verifier checks evidence sufficiency
evidence.why: High-level evidence workflow - independently verified

evidence.summary: Demand explicitly requests external research on https://example.com as test target for web/fetch/search-capable tools
evidence.why: External research requirement specified in demand

risks: If agent providers ignore scope=external markings and use web evidence as project facts, the validation could be bypassed at runtime

result.notes: Cross-check independently confirms all explorer findings. The code structure, doctrinal specifications, and runtime validation all support the claimed behavior: scope separation between project facts (requiring repo-relative paths) and external research (marked scope=external with URLs). No contradictions or weakenings found.

agent_results.claim: Verify blockers and assumptions are not promoted to facts.
risks: Evidence agent did not return a valid completed result.

problem: Existing YOLO demand evidence dispatch API/schema behavior must support research/fetch style evidence without mixing external facts with target-project facts. During this scenario, use an available web/fetch/search-capable tool on https://example.com only as external background evidence.
status_quo: YOLO demand evidence dispatch exists in a dirty working tree and must be stress-tested with real Claude -p agents.
desired_outcome: Agents can use web/fetch/search-capable tools as external evidence, mark fetched/web records scope=external, and still require project-scoped path evidence for target-project facts.
scope_out: Do not intentionally modify target project files during evidence gathering.
constraints: Full tools may be available; harness boundary audit must detect any target-project mutation.
acceptance_criteria: Agents can use web/fetch/search-capable tools as external evidence, mark fetched/web records scope=external, and still require project-scoped path evidence for target-project facts.
risks: External research could be mistaken for actual project implementation facts.
